name: Slowloris-style log padding
description: Alert with extremely large raw_log designed to slow regex processing

siem_event.raw_log: FAILED LOGIN attempt from 185.220.101.45 for user admin. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA Failed password. Attempt 1 of 500.

name: Unicode homoglyph metadata poisoning
description: Alert with Cyrillic homoglyphs in rule_name to test Unicode normalization

siem_event.raw_log: From: attacker@evil.com To: victim@company.com Subject: Urgent! Click http://evil-site.com/login

name: Nested encoding attack
description: Base64-encoded attack indicators requiring multiple decoding passes

name: Benign metadata with attack content
description: Alert classified as benign_system_event but with attack indicators in raw_log

siem_event.raw_log: Windows Update completed successfully. Also: DROP TABLE users; SELECT * FROM passwords; --

name: Path traversal in Windows event fields
description: Windows-style path traversal in event fields that might bypass Unix-centric detection

description: Cross-category attack: SQLi payload embedded in Kerberos authentication event

description: Alert with zero-width Unicode characters to test sanitizer
